changelog: `[2021-02-18 05:45:50 UTC]` Repurposing the spotify command since presence intent sucks.
`[2021-02-18 15:17:04 UTC]` Fixed `1bal` bug and finished rewriting the `spotify` command.
`[2021-02-19 02:29:37 UTC]` Added the `playlist` subcommand to the `spotify` command.
`[2021-02-19 15:09:46 UTC]` Every bot response now should become a reply. (Dont worry it doesnt ping)
`[2021-02-19 16:31:54 UTC]` The spotify command now has an optional `--card` flag.
`[2021-02-22 01:25:38 UTC]` Added new subcommand: `members` to `role` command.
`[2021-02-24 11:11:28 UTC]` Fixed image gen commands not working with default emojis.
`[2021-02-24 11:45:27 UTC]` Added a stricter rule to people inviting the bot to bot farms where there are more bots than half the members.
`[2021-02-28 13:18:19 UTC]` Less database calls for economy commands, New command: `1cooldowns`, Removed `1new` command.
`[2021-03-09 12:07:07 UTC]` `bal` command should now automatically create profiles for you (if you dont have one).
